name: Did He Upload Something!
description: Send a message to a Discord webhook at level upload!

webhook-url.name: Webhook URL
webhook-url.description: Discord webhook URL to send to

send-on-update.name: Send on Level Update
send-on-update.description: also send a webhook when you update an existing level

use-custom-text.name: Use Custom Text
use-custom-text.description: Use your own message template from customtext.txt instead of the default one

open-custom-text.name: Custom Text
open-custom-text.description: Opens customtext.txt(on windows) in your mod config folder. Variables: {creator}, {name}, {id}, {lengh}, {objects}, {role}, {isUploaded"text"}, {isUpdated"text"}

role-ping.name: Role Ping
role-ping.description: ping a role when a message is sent

role-id.name: Role ID
role-id.description: the Discord role ID to ping. In the preset this appears spoilered at the bottom. In custom text, place {role} wherever you want it!
